title: Freckled Fawn Giveaway
excerpt: Freckled Fawn is an online shop that manufactures the most delightful embellishments--washi tape, wood chips, paper clips, resin shapes, and stamps! They are excited to offer a $40.00 gift card to one of Amy Tangerine's followers. Make sure to visit…
body:
Freckled Fawn

is an online shop that manufactures the most delightful embellishments--washi tape, wood chips, paper clips, resin shapes, and stamps! They are excited to offer a $40.00 gift card to one of Amy Tangerine's followers. Make sure to visit Freckled Fawn on

facebook

and

instagram

!

GIVEAWAY:

To enter for a chance to win the gift card, leave a comment here with what you love from Freckled Fawn.

Giveaway will end on Friday, July 12 at 8pm PST, and a winner will be announced shortly after on this post. GOOD LUCK!

In addition to the giveaway, all United States customers can receive FREE shipping by using the code "

Amy Shipping

" during checkout. All International customers can receive 15% off their orders by using the code "

AmyInternational

" during checkout. Codes must be entered at checkout. Codes will expire on July 15.

GIVEAWAY IS NOW CLOSED - The winner is #77 -

Kathleen Ducharme

says:

July 11, 2013 at 8:54 am

I am so into wood veneers! Love their products! Thanks for the give away!

Congrats!
